integrity.description: Agent used the FreeMED web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must interact with the FreeMED web interface in a browser. Look for the FreeMED logo, navigation menus, and standard web UI elements.

integrity.description: Data was entered into appropriate modules
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be entered into the specific FreeMED modules (Vitals, Immunizations, Notes, Scheduling), not just written in a single generic text box or an external text editor.

integrity.description: No terminal commands or direct database modifications were used
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing SQL commands, database clients, or scripts being executed to bypass the GUI.
